verdict: A decent attempt at mapping a high-energy electronic track, but severely held back by highly awkward vertical 16th-note transitions and occasional rhythmic jitter in the intro.

issues.problem: Awkward 16th-note vertical transition (D to U). At 160 BPM, this requires a jarring double-step or slide that completely disrupts physical flow.
Repeated fast vertical transition (D to U) on 16th-note timing, forcing another uncomfortable double-step.
The intro vocal phrasing is mapped with highly uneven 16th/8th note spacing (94ms / 187ms) which feels jittery to play compared to the actual spoken rhythm.
Extremely tight 16th-note window (86ms) between releasing the D hold and hitting the JUMP UR, leading to potential premature hold drops or miss flags.
Multiple rapid U->D and U->D vertical 16th transitions in close succession, which is highly physically exhausting and awkward on a pad.
